TOOLS: k8s.get_pods(namespace*), k8s.get_logs(pod*,lines?), grafana.query(metric*,period?), outlook.send_email(to*,subject*,body*), slack.send_message(channel*,message*)
MODELS: default|chat, code-gen|code
USER: Проверь состояние production кластера, собери метрики за последний час, и если есть проблемы — отправь алерт в Slack и подробный отчёт на почту DevOps команде
output:
1. TOOL k8s.get_pods|namespace=production
2. CHECK {from_1}|expect=all pods Running
3. TOOL grafana.query|metric=error_rate_5xx|period=1h
4. TOOL grafana.query|metric=cpu_usage|period=1h
5. TOOL grafana.query|metric=memory_usage|period=1h
6. TOOL k8s.get_logs|pod={from_1.unhealthy}|lines=300
7. MODEL code-gen|task=analyze cluster health from pods status, metrics and logs|context={from_1},{from_3},{from_4},{from_5},{from_6}
8. CHECK {from_7}|expect=health assessment with severity level
9. TOOL slack.send_message|channel=#alerts|message=Production alert: {from_7.summary}
10. TOOL outlook.send_email|to=devops-team|subject=Production Health Report|body={from_7}
11. DONE

6. TOOL k8s.get_logs|pod={from_1.unhealthy_pods}|lines=100
7. MODEL default|task=compile staging health report from metrics and logs|context={from_1},{from_3},{from_4},{from_5},{from_6}
8. TOOL teams.send_message|to=#staging-ops|message={from_7}
9. DONE

TOOLS: k8s.get_pods(namespace*), k8s.get_logs(pod*,lines?), grafana.query(metric*,period?), outlook.send_email(to*,subject*,body*), teams.send_message(to*,message*)
MODELS: default|chat, code-gen|code
USER: Проверь состояние продакшена — поды, ошибки за последний час, время ответа. Если есть проблемы, отправь отчёт команде на почту и в Teams
output:
1. TOOL k8s.get_pods|namespace=production
2. CHECK {from_1}|expect=all pods in Running state
3. TOOL grafana.query|metric=error_rate_5xx|period=1h
4. TOOL grafana.query|metric=response_time_p99|period=1h
5. TOOL k8s.get_logs|pod={from_1.unhealthy}|lines=50
6. CHECK {from_3}|expect=error rate below 1%
7. CHECK {from_4}|expect=p99 below 500ms
8. MODEL default|task=create production health report with pod status, error rates, response times and any issues found|context={from_1},{from_3},{from_4},{from_5}
9. TOOL outlook.send_email|to=ops-team@company.com|subject=Production Health Report|body={from_8}
10. TOOL teams.send_message|to=#ops-team|message={from_8}
11. DONE
